Order](/track-my-order) * [Contact Us](/contact) * [Customer Login](../login) 1. [Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Custom Flags](https://www.banners.com/fabric-flags) 3. [Tear Drop Flags](https://www.banners.com/custom-flags/tear-drop-flags) 4. 8 Foot Tear Drop Flag # 8 Foot Tear Drop Flags ### Order Tear Drop Flags Online ![Custom 8ft teardrop flag for a car dealership | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/43d4ccef95a84104b50826374d3df4f3.jpg) * [Product Overview](#b2e00ac6-fd63-4e7e-a918-5fd1ee88e1e6) * [Template](#96269564-4883-42f2-b4b7-fd27750ac737) #### [Material](#materialCollapse) Tear Drop Flags are printed using a direct dye-sublimation printing process on our flag material. Direct dye-sublimation printing means that the ink goes through the material instead of just sitting on top of the material. Our fabric material is temperature sensitive and due to the printing process it can expand and contract due to heat or cold. Because of this we cannot guarantee the exact size of any fabric product due to temperature fluctuations. We are not responsible for any product received that is too small or big for your purposes. If the size needs to be precise, such as if it is being installed into an existing frame or hardware, please express this to your CSR to discuss your specific application. #### [Base Options](#base-optionsCollapse) There are several different types of bases available for your flag(s): **4 Leg Standard Base** ![4 Leg Standard Base](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/4-Leg-Standard-Base_450x450px-KB_RIOT.jpg) The 4 Leg Standard Base is intended for indoor use. **Heavy Duty Cross Foot Base** ![Heavy Duty Cross Foot Base](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Heavy-Duty-Cross-Foot-Base_450x450px-KB_RIOT.jpg) The Heavy Duty Cross Foot Base is intended for indoor or outdoor use. **Spike Base** ![Spike Base](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Spike-Base_450x450px-KB_RIOT.jpg) The Spike Base is intended for outdoor use. #### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse) #### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse) Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps files — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you. #### [Design Templates](#design-templatesCollapse) If you woudl like to design your own Tear Drop Flag, you can download our template and upload it. We will check the artwork and send you a proof to verify that everything looks ok before we send the order into production. ![Tear Drop Flags](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-16/Tear%20Drop%20Sail%20Signs%20-%20Lawnsigns.com.jpg) Tear Drop Flags **6 Foot Tear Drop Flag** [20.75"W x 52.25" H Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/6%20ft%20Tear%20Drop%20Flag.pdf)< **8 Foot Tear Drop Flag** [29.5"W x 66.3"H Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/8ft%20Tear%20Drop%20Flag.pdf) **11.5 Foot Tear Drop Flag** [38.5"W x 106.2"H Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/11.5ft%20Tear%20Drop%20Flag.pdf) **15 Foot Tear Drop Flag** [47"W x 156.1"H Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/15ft%20Tear%20Drop%20Flag.pdf) #### [Artwork/Order Proofs](#artworkorder-proofsCollapse) If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until
